intent: discover what the CLI can do
notes: Strong first command; includes command catalog, stdout/stderr contract, repeatable flags, and next_commands.
Warns only for known workspace-inventory eval-case debt; next_commands are useful.
Help is parseable but does not prevent unsupported safety flags at execution time.

intent: run eval safely through primary CLI
notes: Unsupported --dry-run was ignored and a detached live harness launched.
JSON error is good; missing did_you_mean/next_command.

intent: detect bad flag on side-effecting primary CLI
notes: Unknown flag was ignored and optimizer output was created.

intent: validate eval cases via strict primary wrapper
notes: Wrapper rejected the unknown flag with JSON stderr/status 400.

intent: run repo checks in machine mode
notes: repo-check-result.v1 JSON correctly reported the known workspace-inventory eval debt.

intent: detect bad flag in checker machine mode
notes: JSON is parseable but lacks explicit exit_code/kind fields inside payload.

intent: run eval harness safely in robot mode

intent: detect bad flag in runner robot mode
